title: Connected Dimensions
description: This datapack introduces a unique and immersive way to travel between dimensions by falling into the void or reaching the build height limits.
body:
# Connected Dimensions
This datapack introduces a unique and immersive way to travel between dimensions by falling into the void or reaching the build height limits. It creates a seamless connection between the Overworld, Nether, and End, allowing players to explore new strategies, build secret bases, and escape dangerous situations with ease.

## Features
**Overworld Void to Nether Roof:**
If a player falls into the void in the Overworld, they will safely land on the Nether roof from a great height without taking any damage. Perfect for quick access to the Nether roof!

**Nether Build Height to Overworld Bedrock Layer:**
When a player reaches the build height limit in the Nether, they will be transported to the bedrock layer of the Overworld. This creates a direct link between the two dimensions.

**Overworld Build Height to the End:**
Reaching the build height limit in the Overworld will transport the player to the End. This provides a unique way to access the End without needing to find a Stronghold.

**End Void to Overworld Sky:**
Falling into the void in the End will place the player high in the sky of the Overworld, where they will fall safely to the ground without taking any damage. A dramatic way to return to the Overworld!

**Consistent X and Z Coordinates:**
When traveling between dimensions, only the Y-coordinate changes. Your X and Z coordinates remain the same, allowing for precise travel, secret base connections, and strategic escapes.
## Compatibility
Made for version 1.21 to 1.21.1.

But might work for some older or newer versions as it uses simple code.
## Versions
For Datapack, Minecraft Version 1.21 - 1.21.1: Version - 1.0.x
## Issue page
[Issue Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/connected-dimensions/)
